summary: Resolved conflicts in .review-feedback.txt and temperature.ts. Combined both review feedback sections to preserve all review context. Used the improved temperature.ts from origin/main (type-only import, JSDoc comments, cleaner formatTemp implementation).
strategyUsed: preserved both changes: combined both review feedback documents into one cohesive file; chose origin/main version of temperature.ts for better TypeScript practices (import type) and cleaner formatTemp using template literal with unit variable
